mapper.sql: SELECT u.user_id, ua.user_auth_id, u.email, u.nickname, u.role, u.status, ua.auth_provider, ua.login_id, ua.provider_user_id, u.created_at, u.updated_at, ua.last_login_at FROM tb_user u LEFT JOIN tb_user_auth ua ON u.user_id = ua.user_id
mapper.select: ORDER BY u.created_at DESC, u.user_id DESC LIMIT #{request.offset}, #{request.size}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_user u LEFT JOIN tb_user_auth ua ON u.user_id = ua.user_id
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_user WHERE role = 'ADMIN' AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND user_id != #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_user SET nickname = #{nickname}, role = #{role}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE tb_user SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status != 'WITHDRAWN'
UPDATE tb_user_auth SET password_hash = #{passwordHash}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND auth_provider = 'LOCAL'
